title: Verify Trending section displays top 10 content in user's primary dialect
description: Test that the Trending section is correctly populated based on the user's language preference.
preconditions: User's primary dialect is set (e.g., Hindi)

steps.description: 1. Set user's primary dialect to Hindi.
2. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.
3. Scroll to and observe the 'Trending' section.

expected_result: The section displays a list of the Top 10 trending shows and movies available in Hindi.
